When your startup is properly structured:

#opensource #cybersecurity #sponsorship
the bounty model is what makes open-source ecosystems self-sustaining. paying contributors in the native token creates alignment that grant programs alone can't match.

The Internet Bug Bounty program — which has paid security researchers over $1.5 million since 2012 to find and report flaws in open-source software — has stopped accepting new reports. HackerOne, which runs the program, says AI tools are now finding bugs faster than developers

*Strategic Insight: Internet Bug Bounty program hits pause on payouts*

 *Context:* HackerOne paused Internet Bug Bounty (IBB) payments after a surge of high-volume, quality-ambiguous reports — many apparently AI-assisted — overwhelmed triage and open-source remediation

AI‑slop drowning bug‑bounty programs: major open‑source projects quietly shut bounty programs because AI‑generated reports flood triage with low‑signal noise, making human‑driven research economically unviable.
